mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signals an accommodative monetary policy, compressing discount rates and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 70%+ of periods when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL increase above 2.5% signals inflationary pressures prompting rate hikes, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in INDPRO and RSAFS signal weakening industrial activity and corporate demand, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive when both INDPRO and RSAFS decline.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-unemployment regime (UNRATE < 4%), rising PAYEMS signals tight labor markets boosting corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when UNRATE < 4% and PAYEMS rises.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained job growth (PAYEMS) above 100k monthly signals strong labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when PAYEMS exceeds 100k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly INDPRO decline exceeding 1% signals industrial contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive when INDPRO falls >1% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDPC1 and HOUST indicates strong demand fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative when both GDPC1 and HOUST rise.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-interest-rate regime (FEDFUNDS > 3%), tighter monetary policy suppresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive when FEDFUNDS exceeds 3%.
